name: Sweet Lassi
recipeInstructions:
1. In a blender or food processor, blend the yogurt and ice cubes for 30 seconds.
2. Add lemon juice and sugar to the mixture. Blend until thoroughly combined.
3. Pour the mixture over additional ice cubes in glasses.
4. Sprinkle crushed cumin seeds on top of each glass.
5. Garnish with lemon slices and a fresh mint sprig, if desired.
